title: Spicy Malaysian Chicken Curry
description: A flavorful and spicy curry made with Malaysian flavors and chicken. Serve with steamed rice or noodles.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the curry paste and red pepper flakes to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Add the fish sauce, sugar, and vinegar to the skillet and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and let the curry simmer for 10-15 minutes.
Stir in the cilantro and basil, and season with salt to taste.
Serve the curry over steamed rice or noodles.
Garnish with additional cilantro and basil, if desired.
